sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41718" key="e)piye/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιψέγω</orth>, <sense id="n41718.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπικηδεύω</ref> </xr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">(bury),</tr_> Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψέγος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
